slogan: Automatisez votre prospection. Accélérez votre croissance.

headings.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-bold tracking-tight text-[#1F2937]
headings.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-[#1F2937]

colors.primary_description: Light Blue - Used for highlights, subtle backgrounds, and brand identity.
colors.cta_description: Teal - Used for primary buttons, active states, and high-emphasis elements.
colors.background_description: Off-white Pink - Main app and landing page background.
colors.borders_description: Light Gray - Used for borders, dividers, and card outlines.
colors.text_dark_description: Dark Gray - Used for primary text and headings.

layout.border_radius: Rounded 20px (rounded-[20px]) everywhere including cards, buttons, modals.

glassmorphism.usage: Sticky headers, floating navs, modals, and premium stat cards.

buttons.primary: bg-[#22819A] text-white rounded-[20px] px-6 py-3 font-medium hover:bg-[#1a6b82] transition-all duration-300 hover:shadow-[0_8px_20px_rgba(34,129,154,0.3)] hover:-translate-y-0.5
buttons.secondary: bg-[#90C2E7]/20 text-[#22819A] rounded-[20px] px-6 py-3 font-medium hover:bg-[#90C2E7]/30 transition-all duration-300
buttons.outline: border border-[#CDD4DD] text-[#1F2937] bg-white rounded-[20px] px-6 py-3 font-medium hover:border-[#22819A] transition-all duration-300

components.cards: bg-white border border-[#CDD4DD] rounded-[20px] p-6 shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgba(0,0,0,0.04)] hover:shadow-[0_20px_40px_rgba(0,0,0,0.08)] transition-all duration-300
components.inputs: w-full bg-white border border-[#CDD4DD] rounded-[20px] px-4 py-3 text-[#1F2937] focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#90C2E7] focus:border-transparent transition-all duration-300
components.table: w-full text-left text-sm text-[#1F2937]/80. Headers uppercase text-xs tracking-wider text-[#1F2937]/60 pb-3 border-b border-[#CDD4DD]. Rows hover:bg-[#FEF7F8] transition-colors. Tags use rounded-full px-2 py-1 text-xs.

motion.micro_interactions: All hover states use transition-all duration-300 ease-out. Cards lift up slightly (hover:-translate-y-1).
motion.fluid_animations: Use framer-motion for page transitions and staggering lists. Elements fade in and translate up (y: 20 -> 0) on scroll.
motion.glass_reveal: Glass panels use a slight scale-in and blur-in effect on mount.

images.description: 3D render abstract digital visualization depicting neural networks and AI technology - perfect for hero right side or background blending.
Graphs of performance analytics on a laptop screen to represent the SaaS platform.
Professional team collaborating on a project in a well-lit office space - use for Solutions (Agencies/Lawyers).
Blue background with lines and dots representing network and automation.

media.logo_concept: Stylized 'G' with an upward arrow for growth and connected nodes for automation. Uses #22819A and #90C2E7. Implement using SVG directly in the UI.

testing.attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button', data-testid='hero-cta'). Use kebab-case, role-based naming.

landing.hero: H1 Slogan, subtext, primary CTA 'Commencer gratuitement', secondary CTA 'Voir la démo', side image/mockup using abstract nodes.
landing.features: Bento grid (rounded 20px, light glassmorphism) showing Lead Finder, Email Finder, Email Verification, CRM Sync, Campaign Builder, AI Personalization, Reports, Team Workspace, API, Notifications.
landing.solutions: Alternating blocks with images (lawyers, agencies, real estate, SaaS) showing tailored workflows.
landing.pricing: 3 cards (Starter, Pro, Enterprise) with middle highlighted, using soft shadows and #90C2E7 borders.
landing.footer: Documentation, Blog, Contact links, dark text on #FEF7F8 background.

pages_structure.auth: Split screen: left side form (clean SaaS style, glassmorphism card over #FEF7F8), right side abstract nodes or stats mockup.

dashboard.sidebar: Fixed left, white bg, #CDD4DD border right. Links: Overview, Prospects, Campaigns, Automations, CRM, Pipelines, Workflows, Reports, Settings, Profile. Active link uses #90C2E7/20 bg and #22819A text.
dashboard.topbar: Glassmorphism header, search bar, notifications, user profile.
dashboard.overview: Stats cards at top (new leads, campaigns, open rate, replies, meetings booked). Funnel/Growth chart below.
dashboard.prospects_table: Filters at top (Tags, Scores). Table with checkboxes, avatars, company, email, score. Actions dropdown.
dashboard.campaign_builder: Visual node-based UI or step-by-step wizard with connected nodes styling (matching logo concept).

icons: Use lucide-react. Stroke width 1.5. Colors match text or CTA.
